chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-3310 of 2019 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Priority: 1.For hearing of CMA No.14903/2019. 2.For hearing of main case. 02.11.2021 Mr. Muhammad Arif, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Dhani Bux Lashari, Advocate for SBCA. ------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition, which stands dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Abrar
